case_title: TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS. PEDRO CARTAGENA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $793.69 FILED BY TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT CARTAGENA, PEDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF THOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY REYNA ZAPTEECAS COLLECTIONS REPRESENTATIVE. DEFENDANT PEDRO CARTAGENA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-06-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA LATIN JEWELERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PEDRO CARTAGENA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
